creator: ildiclowenac@gmail.com
text:
Regards. The intricacy of the extension and keeping it updated during an upgrade and update process https://geometry-lite.co is one of the main worries.

Upstream bugzilla should ideally include the capability to allow users to transparently change comments and descriptions right out of the box https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=774caa9f467665c4fb424e0372f2c797de716a94
